title: JIPMER Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
post_name: Project Technical Support – I (Data Entry Operator)
short_info: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Project Technical Support – I (Data Entry Operator) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: Up to 28 years

qualification.details: Project Technical Support – I (Data Entry Operator): 10th + Diploma in Computer Application/IT/Computer Sciences with two years of experience in EDP work in Government, Autonomous, PSU or any other recognized organization. A speed of not less than 8000 key depression per hour on computer. Good Command on Tamil & English Typing, Speaking, Reading & Writing.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Project Technical Support – I (Data Entry Operator) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Project Technical Support – I (Data Entry Operator) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for sending complete applications via email is 09-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed 10th grade and possess a Diploma in Computer Application/IT/Computer Sciences. Additionally, two years of experience in EDP work and a typing speed of at least 8000 key depressions per hour are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support – I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is up to 28 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, though not detailed here.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support – I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 21,600/- per month, which includes a basic pay of Rs. 18,000/- and HRA of Rs. 3,600/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JIPMER Project Technical Support – I (Data Entry Operator) job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to email their filled application form, CV, and scanned supporting documents as a single PDF to [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test followed by an interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job. The recruitment is for a specific project duration, and the appointment will be on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What are the required typing skills for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a typing speed of not less than 8000 key depressions per hour on the computer and a good command of Tamil and English typing, speaking, reading, and writing.

faq.question: Q9. Where is JIPMER located?
faq.answer: JIPMER is located in Puducherry. The recruitment is for a project based in Puducherry.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs, along with your CV and the filled application form.
